tests.description: Default plain-text output. Verifies .contentignore and .generatetreeignore are loaded from project root.
tests.expected: project_structure.txt created. Files listed in .generatetreeignore absent from tree. Files listed in .contentignore present in tree.
project_structure.md created. Tree wrapped in fenced code block.

tests.description: Markdown output with file contents. Binary files and .contentignore entries must be suppressed.
tests.expected: Each non-ignored, non-binary file rendered with syntax-highlighted fenced block. Binary files show '_Binary file - skipped._'.

tests.description: Tree depth limited to 3 levels. Directories beyond depth 3 must not be expanded.
tests.expected: depth4file.txt absent from output. depth3file.txt present.

tests.description: Custom output path via -o. Output file must not appear in the tree.
tests.expected: File written to test_folder/generated_with_-o_param.md. File excluded from tree automatically.

tests.description: CLI-level content skip via --skip-content. Target file must appear in tree but show skip notice in content section.
tests.expected: project_structure.txt present in tree. Content section shows '_Skipped by --skip-content._'.
